commonProblems.h2: Renault Kwid Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Renault Kwid is a budget-focused city car, but its 1.0L B4D and older 0.8L B4A engines have specific weaknesses that drive replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Plastic Oil Sump Failure - Why Renault Kwid Engines Leak Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Renault Kwid RXE, RXL, RXT, Climber (2016-Present, B4D)
problems.rootCause: The factory-fitted plastic oil sump is prone to cracking from road debris, heat cycling, or rough terrain, leading to catastrophic oil loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Drain oil, remove plastic sump, fit upgraded aluminium or OEM sump.
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent fix if upgraded sump is used.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt B4D engine due to bottom-end damage from oil starvation.
repairOptions.longevity: Restores vehicle to peak condition with 12-month warranty.

problems.recommendation: If caught early with low oil pressure warnings, a sump replacement is highly cost-effective. However, if the engine has run low on oil and developed a knock, a rebuilt unit is the only safe option for a car worth £4,000-£6,000.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt B4D engine prices for your Renault Kwid

problems.h4: Sudden Power Loss & Misfire - Electronic & Fuel System Faults
problems.rootCause: Faulty electronic throttle bodies, failing fuel pumps, or P0301 cylinder 1 misfire codes caused by degraded ignition coils or injector issues.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace fuel pump, ignition coils, or clean throttle body.
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if internal engine compression is still good.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt B4D engine if internal damage has occurred.
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if multiple sensors and compression issues exist.

problems.recommendation: Always diagnose the exact cause of the P0301 code first. If it is just an ignition coil or fuel pump, repair is cheap. But if the engine is burning oil or losing compression, replacement is more economical than repeated sensor swaps.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kwid 1.0L engine replacement from UK specialists

problems.h4: Excessive Engine Noise & Vibration - Mount & Balance Shaft Wear
problems.rootCause: The 3-cylinder layout generates high NVH. Engine mounts collapse prematurely, and on the older B4A, balance shaft wear causes severe internal rattling.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace engine and gearbox mounts to reduce cabin vibration.
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix if internal engine noise is present.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt B4A or B4D engine with updated balance shafts/mounts.
repairOptions.longevity: Restores refinement and reliability for the long term.

problems.recommendation: On the 0.8L B4A, internal rattling usually means the balance shaft is failing, requiring an engine replacement. On the 1.0L B4D, check the mounts first; if the noise is internal, a rebuilt unit is the only cure.
problems.cta: Find a reconditioned Renault Kwid engine with 12-month warranty

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Renault Kwid
finalCta.paragraph: The Kwid is a highly affordable vehicle, but engine failures can quickly exceed its residual value if you rely on main dealer pricing. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Renault Kwid specialists who understand imported and budget models. With nationwide delivery, supply & fit options, and upgraded components, you can get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Renault Kwid Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket’s UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Renault Kwid and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Renault Kwid Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Kwid's production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Kwid launches with the 0.8L B4A 3-cylinder, setting the template for ultra-budget transport.
keyChanges: Renault Kwid introduced to global markets (RHD via Ireland/imports to UK).
0.8L B4A engine becomes the sole powertrain.
Basic RXE and RXL trims dominate.
knownFor: Extremely cheap to buy but lacks highway power.
Severe 3-cylinder vibration and balance shaft rattles.
High demand for cheap used engines from early importers.
years.cta: Get quotes for 2015 Renault Kwid replacement engines

years.description: The 1.0L B4D replaces the 0.8L, bringing much-needed power and the option of an AMT gearbox.
keyChanges: 0.8L B4A discontinued in favour of 1.0L B4D.
Introduction of RXT trim and AMT Easy-R automatic transmission.
2017 sees the launch of the rugged Climber variant.
knownFor: The 1.0L engine transforms the Kwid into a viable used car.
Plastic oil sump becomes a known weak point on early B4D units.
AMT gearbox requires specific engine mapping and health.
years.ticker: Renault Kwid 1.0 engine replacement • Kwid B4D engine for sale • Kwid AMT engine price

years.description: A major facelift updates the interior and exterior, while the B4D engine receives minor emissions and mapping tweaks.
keyChanges: 2018 facelift introduces new styling and improved interior.
B4D 400 engine code introduced for updated emissions compliance.
Expansion of international trims (Zen, Intens) seen via imports.
knownFor: Build quality improves, but NVH remains a characteristic.
Electronic throttle body faults start appearing around 60k miles.
Solid choice for city driving if the sump is inspected.
years.cta: Get quotes for 2018 Renault Kwid replacement engines

years.description: Recent models focus on safety upgrades and stricter emissions, with the B4D 410 code appearing in later iterations.
keyChanges: 2021 facelift adds dual airbags and ABS as standard on many trims.
B4D 410 engine code introduced for latest emissions standards.
Continued reliance on the 1.0L NA petrol engine.
knownFor: Modern Kwids are much safer but still budget-focused.
Engine reliability is generally good if oil changes are frequent.
Replacement demand is currently low as models are too new.
years.cta: Enquire about late-model Renault Kwid engine availability

faq.h2: Renault Kwid Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Renault Kwid engine in the UK?
items.answer: Replacing a Renault Kwid engine typically costs between £395 and £750 for the unit itself, with supply and fit adding £300 to £500. Total costs depend on whether you choose a used, rebuilt, or reconditioned B4D or B4A engine.
keyPoints: Used B4D engines start around £250 to £450.
Rebuilt units range from £395 to £650 supply only.
Supply and fit services add £300 to £500 in labour.
Reconditioned engines with upgraded parts cost £450 to £750.
items.cta: Get a fixed price Renault Kwid engine replacement quote today

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Renault Kwid?
items.answer: Yes, if the replacement cost is under £1,000, it is usually worth replacing the engine on a Renault Kwid, given the car's low residual value. A rebuilt engine extends the vehicle's life for a fraction of the cost of a replacement car.
keyPoints: A used Kwid is worth £4,000 to £7,000 depending on age.
Main dealer replacements often exceed the car's total value.
Independent specialist rebuilds keep costs below £1,000.
A rebuilt engine with a 12-month warranty adds resale confidence.
items.cta: Find out if your Renault Kwid is worth repairing vs scrapping

items.question: What are the most common Renault Kwid engine problems?
items.answer: The most common Renault Kwid engine problems include plastic oil sump cracking, sudden power loss from electronic throttle faults, and excessive vibration from worn engine mounts or balance shafts.
keyPoints: Plastic oil sumps crack under heat or road debris.
P0301 misfire codes point to failing ignition coils or injectors.
Earthing wire faults can cause the engine to immobilise.
3-cylinder NVH leads to premature engine mount collapse.
items.cta: Compare rebuilt B4D engine prices to fix Kwid problems

items.question: Are Renault Kwid B4D engines reliable?
items.answer: The Renault Kwid B4D 1.0L engine is generally reliable for city use, but it suffers from specific weak points like the plastic oil sump and electronic throttle body that require monitoring to prevent catastrophic failure.
keyPoints: The bottom end is robust if oil changes are frequent.
Plastic sumps must be inspected for cracks or leaks.
Electronic throttle bodies can fail around 60,000 miles.
Upgraded aluminium sumps are available as a preventative fix.
items.cta: Find a reconditioned B4D engine with upgraded components

items.question: Can I fit a Renault Kwid engine myself?
items.answer: While mechanically simple, fitting a Renault Kwid engine yourself is not recommended due to the need for ECU resets, immobiliser matching, and AMT gearbox calibration if applicable.
keyPoints: The ECU must be matched to the immobiliser system.
AMT variants require specialist gearbox calibration.
Incorrect earthing wire connections cause running faults.
Professional supply and fit includes all software resets.
items.cta: Find a UK specialist for Renault Kwid engine supply and fit

items.question: Does a replacement Renault Kwid engine come with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes, every replacement Renault Kwid engine supplied through EngineMarket comes with a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, protecting you against internal failures and manufacturing defects.
keyPoints: Used engines typically include a 3 to 6-month warranty.
Rebuilt and reconditioned units carry a 12-month warranty.
Warranty covers internal components and oil pressure issues.
Always confirm terms with your chosen supplier before fitting.
items.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kwid engines with 12-month warranty

items.question: What causes sudden power loss in the Renault Kwid 1.0L?
items.answer: Sudden power loss in the Renault Kwid 1.0L is usually caused by a failing electronic throttle body, a clogged fuel filter, or a P0301 cylinder 1 misfire code triggered by degraded ignition coils.
keyPoints: Electronic throttle bodies fail and trigger limp mode.
Fuel pump starvation causes cut-outs under acceleration.
Ignition coil failure leads to severe misfires.
A full diagnostic scan is required before replacing the engine.

items.question: Where is the engine code located on a Renault Kwid?
items.answer: The engine code on a Renault Kwid (e.g., B4D or B4A) is stamped directly onto the engine block, usually near the gearbox bell housing, and is also listed on the vehicle's VIN plate and registration documents.
keyPoints: Check the VIN plate under the bonnet or on the door sill.
Stamped on the flat machined surface of the engine block.
Essential for ordering the correct rebuilt or used unit.
Our registration lookup tool finds this automatically.
items.cta: Let us identify your Renault Kwid engine code instantly

items.question: Are Renault Kwid engines interchangeable with other Renaults?
items.answer: No, Renault Kwid engines (B4D and B4A) are unique to the Kwid's specific platform and are not interchangeable with other Renault models like the Clio or Captur, which use different engine families.
keyPoints: The B4D is a specific 1.0L 3-cylinder for the Kwid.
ECU mapping and mounting points are model-specific.
Do not buy engines from other Renault models.
Always verify compatibility using your registration number.
items.cta: Check exact Renault Kwid engine compatibility now
